notes: Initial manifest structure for future clickable anatomical areas.
Definitive area IDs and clinical taxonomy mappings will be validated in a later phase.

area_field_contract.id: Stable clinical area identifier saved by the app.
area_field_contract.svg_element_id: Matching SVG element id in the clickable SVG.
area_field_contract.claw_number: Canonical claw number from 1 to 8, or null for shared skin areas.
area_field_contract.limb: Canonical limb code, for example left_front, right_front, left_rear, right_rear.
area_field_contract.digit: Canonical digit position, for example external, internal, central, or null.
area_field_contract.zone_type: Clinical zone family, for example horn or derma.
area_field_contract.zone_code: Canonical zone code used for storage and reporting.
area_field_contract.observation_group: Observation group used by UI and database payloads.
area_field_contract.popup_kind: Popup type to open when clicked.
area_field_contract.is_clickable: Whether this area should receive user taps.
